name: HWR_INVITATION_B
description: This table stores information related to Invitations

columns.Name: INVITATION_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the information about Invitation Id.This acts as the primary key.

columns.Name: INVITOR_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the Invitors Profile Id

columns.Name: INVITEE_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the information on  invitees Profile Id

columns.Name: INVITATION_STATUS
columns.Comments: This stores the information on the status of Invitation

columns.Name: INVITATION_DATE
columns.Comments: This stores the date of Invitation

columns.Name: IS_REGISTERED
columns.Comments: This stores whether the Invitee is Regisitered or not

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
